Package pjv.utils

Class HibernateUtils

java.lang.Object
pjv.utils.HibernateUtils
public class HibernateUtils
extends java.lang.Object
This class contains static methods which utilize Hibernate framework. This methods can fetch, persist and delete data from the PostgreSQL database.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk and Michal Pechník

  • Field Summary

    Fields 
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    static org.hibernate.SessionFactory sessionFactory  

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    HibernateUtils()  

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static void deleteChatRoom​(ChatRoom chatRoom)
    This method deletes ChatRoom instance from the database.
    static void deleteClient​(Client client)
    This method deletes Client instance from the database.
    static void deleteMessage​(Message message)
    This method deletes Message instance from the database.
    static java.util.List fetchChatRooms()
    This method fetches ChatRoom data from the database.
    static java.util.List fetchClients()
    This method fetches Client data from the database.
    static java.util.List fetchMessages()
    This method fetches Message data from the database.
    static void persistChatRoom​(ChatRoom chatRoom)
    This method persists ChatRoom instance to the database.
    static void persistClient​(Client client)
    This method persists Client instance to the database.
    static void persistMessage​(Message message)
    This method persists Message instance to the database.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • sessionFactory

      public static final org.hibernate.SessionFactory sessionFactory

  • Constructor Details

    • HibernateUtils

      public HibernateUtils()

  • Method Details

    • fetchChatRooms

      public static java.util.List fetchChatRooms()
      This method fetches ChatRoom data from the database.
      Returns:
      List of ChatRoom instances

    • persistChatRoom

      public static void persistChatRoom​(ChatRoom chatRoom)
      This method persists ChatRoom instance to the database.
      Parameters:
      chatRoom - ChatRoom instance to be stored into the database.

    • deleteChatRoom

      public static void deleteChatRoom​(ChatRoom chatRoom)
      This method deletes ChatRoom instance from the database.
      Parameters:
      chatRoom - ChatRoom instance to be deleted from the database.

    • fetchMessages

      public static java.util.List fetchMessages()
      This method fetches Message data from the database.
      Returns:
      List of Message instances

    • persistMessage

      public static void persistMessage​(Message message)
      This method persists Message instance to the database.
      Parameters:
      message - Message instance to be stored into the database.

    • deleteMessage

      public static void deleteMessage​(Message message)
      This method deletes Message instance from the database.
      Parameters:
      message - Message instance to be deleted from the database.

    • fetchClients

      public static java.util.List fetchClients()
      This method fetches Client data from the database.
      Returns:
      List of Client instances

    • persistClient

      public static void persistClient​(Client client)
      This method persists Client instance to the database.
      Parameters:
      client - Client instance to be stored into the database.

    • deleteClient

      public static void deleteClient​(Client client)
      This method deletes Client instance from the database.
      Parameters:
      client - Client instance to be deleted from the database.
